title: Insights
content:
Read our analysis of the latest legal developments affecting your business.

### Technology Perspectives Outlook 2026
Our Outlook provides practical analysis of the trends organizations need to understand as they optimize products, streamline operations, and manage risk in an increasingly complex environment.

### Public Procurement 2025 Year in Review
Clear, practical insights to help purchasers and suppliers navigate the evolving landscape of Canadian public procurement — and prepare for what’s ahead.

### Cross-Border Trade & Tariffs Roundup
Our Cross-border Trade & Tariffs Roundup page is your trusted source for timely insights into the latest developments regarding Canada’s global trade relationships.
